function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: Oldest Nina-linked invoice
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_28__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - entity.nina
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest invoice linked to Nina:

- INV-0001, issued 2025-10-28

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email draft written successfully. Per inbox workflow and inbox lane rules, since the request was fully completed from canonical evidence, next delete the processed inbox file.

Inbox item deleted after successful completion. Final step is to report completion with all files I actually relied on and a concise justification grounded in the canonical records and workflows read.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by creating a durable outbound email draft replying to Miles with the oldest Nina-linked invoice attached, then deleting the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read 99_system tree and relevant workflows before task work, treated inbox email header as canonical transport metadata, used Nina's canonical primary_contact_email record for identity resolution, relied on canonical project and invoice records to verify Nina linkage, created outbound email record in 60_outbox/outbox per sending-email.md, and deleted the inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md asked for the oldest 1 invoices linked to Nina. Nina was verified in 10_entities/cast/nina.md. Canonical project records in 40_projects/2026_03_26_northstar_ledger/README.MD and 40_projects/2026_04_23_helios_workflow_sprint/README.MD linked Nina to the Northstar and Helios project lanes. The exact oldest matching invoice was confirmed by the canonical invoice record 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_28__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md, which explicitly lists related_entity Nina Schreiber and issued_on 2025-10-28. Using the inbox email header and sending-email workflow, I created the draft reply addressed to miles@novak.example with that invoice attached and then removed the processed inbox item per workflow.
